title: EcoBag - 20 Pack Extra Strong Heavy Duty Refuse Sacks - 100L - 33 Microns - Recyclable Bin Bags, Leak Resistant, Eco-Friendly, Durable Waste DIsposal Bags for Household & Commercial Use 736×990mm
features: Eco-Friendly Material: Crafted from a minimum of 98% recycled plastic, our refuse sacks are an excellent choice for environmentally conscious consumers, actively contributing to plastic waste reduction and promoting recycling.

Built to Withstand Heavy Loads: Without tearing or puncturing, these heavy-duty refuse sacks offer reliable performance for both household and commercial use, ensuring durability for even the toughest jobs.

Extra Leak Resistant Bin Liners: Engineered with superior leak resistance, these bags effectively prevent unwanted spills and leaks, making them ideal for managing wet or sharp waste and keeping your environment clean and mess-free.
100% Recyclable: These bags can be fully recycled after use, aligning with eco-friendly practices, and helping to minimize your carbon footprint by ensuring environmentally responsible disposal.

Convenient Packaging: Includes 10 extra strong refuse sacks, measuring 736 x 990 mm and holding up to 100L. This provides a substantial supply for your waste disposal needs, offering great value and convenience for continuous use.
description: From the manufacturer 20 Heavy Duty Refuse Sacks 100Litre 20 Heavy Duty Refuse Sacks 100L This is by far the strongest bag within our refuse sack range. This bag is a 100litre 140gauge back which is perfect for all your general house waste. Made with an extra leak resistant seal to help prevent leakage. *FOR AUTHENTICITY PLEASE PURCHASE VIA 'DISPATCHED BY AMAZON'* Size 736mm x 990mm (100litre) refuse sack. I Used To Be Rubbish These bags are made from a minimum of 98% recycled plastic & are 100% recyclable. Doing Our Bit To Help Because we make these bags from recycled plastics, We are doing our bit help to prevent some plastic going to landfill sites.
